      - Task-specific SLM applications | papers: abdceff7d7983cdede9a5aabe6a476d4c72e41a3; 4dbaa1b5ff973e50a2ddb569d5ab1ac783d4c8f5; 2922768fd451ecdb45f48c1a83eb57f54a91221b; 6a6cbcc596758dd214120a1d51528ce55daa333d; d09d4c66cea1bc4b0405206092715ccd4ec6cb44; aea817017e18cc1cb34962ffd399f8a83ab7a076; 2f8a1714e3bb01c522fede9c902bd7cf5320a802; d2ea161e6b2114529d875d16cfaad4c824e17a8c; 2fd80ce448b0bf55963a6fd990ea8ef4c0209e6f; 1f2a20a6efaf83214861dddae4a38a83ae18fe32; 0b0debb710366cdff461938c80763eace1651af6; dd3268b6fb685b7e31ca576f2a629467da90d662; f9db375824ca667897229f570ceb699ab05f1483; d552ca135ea18a688b385984f8aab983d2098dc7; f665c28c6d5acb171774b85f85970a0428000eb8; 4ce44526dfca878c76bdadd5c0a2ac4d6a192323; 092f833b61414b6fe314b9695367df9f8a1cf324; 4e36db22808c1d677438137b10979a9279fb6c1f; beb21c9f339bb040e8f360b45eda0f9b10b2c95c; ea19292be87cdd8b37b6548f224fd4fbf354501e; 2b4d0d99d1b210d97ca665239ef3e90d794af488; 29a3c6968888d8078d21ff5b7d9e6d78c470fdb0; 301e13f3df8f9dfb79ea782da3693e2942392279; 63c2790ae3e086711e8e28c05867221f49c0401c; d44031f253668c61ac6d68b95bbe9cac57730d51; 0d0900f2afa1db5c4133907aaaacb21b9a8d86b3; e22048955c6648201f0d708e8b0688d3b1be741d; 5de0279248f2c688b0a6fb09be6d23bb6890e3b2; 09d75875813ecee343f81bdd90667df41d7b2b54; 53df194e5bce8e864d0b23eeecc5900a2af05e06; cb23a59fdf3ade707600f076df4ff27a03941fba; a0ab8c94158906ce6cd4dbe99e2df292d70a03f5
    - Applications of SLMs | papers: abdceff7d7983cdede9a5aabe6a476d4c72e41a3; 4dbaa1b5ff973e50a2ddb569d5ab1ac783d4c8f5; 2922768fd451ecdb45f48c1a83eb57f54a91221b; 6a6cbcc596758dd214120a1d51528ce55daa333d; d09d4c66cea1bc4b0405206092715ccd4ec6cb44; aea817017e18cc1cb34962ffd399f8a83ab7a076; 2f8a1714e3bb01c522fede9c902bd7cf5320a802; d2ea161e6b2114529d875d16cfaad4c824e17a8c; 2fd80ce448b0bf55963a6fd990ea8ef4c0209e6f; 1f2a20a6efaf83214861dddae4a38a83ae18fe32; 0b0debb710366cdff461938c80763eace1651af6; dd3268b6fb685b7e31ca576f2a629467da90d662; f9db375824ca667897229f570ceb699ab05f1483; d552ca135ea18a688b385984f8aab983d2098dc7; f665c28c6d5acb171774b85f85970a0428000eb8; 4ce44526dfca878c76bdadd5c0a2ac4d6a192323; 092f833b61414b6fe314b9695367df9f8a1cf324; 4e36db22808c1d677438137b10979a9279fb6c1f; beb21c9f339bb040e8f360b45eda0f9b10b2c95c; ea19292be87cdd8b37b6548f224fd4fbf354501e; 2b4d0d99d1b210d97ca665239ef3e90d794af488; 29a3c6968888d8078d21ff5b7d9e6d78c470fdb0; 301e13f3df8f9dfb79ea782da3693e2942392279; 63c2790ae3e086711e8e28c05867221f49c0401c; d44031f253668c61ac6d68b95bbe9cac57730d51; 0d0900f2afa1db5c4133907aaaacb21b9a8d86b3; e22048955c6648201f0d708e8b0688d3b1be741d; 5de0279248f2c688b0a6fb09be6d23bb6890e3b2; 09d75875813ecee343f81bdd90667df41d7b2b54; 53df194e5bce8e864d0b23eeecc5900a2af05e06; cb23a59fdf3ade707600f076df4ff27a03941fba; a0ab8c94158906ce6cd4dbe99e2df292d70a03f5; 4d7da69c61db94386424675d8fa01fb0a279f3b5; 7a54aad06171f59149aca5380863c62729c70b41; f7310dac21abc6ba357bcd5e75fb2e6957a97303; 74894e3d6cdaceba75d6c256abc1cf82483e4e21; 02377b6fa91ae7de8d06314c7bbe205cf84a05de; dc7b27b0a1d891e16f80dd9b8eec0aa8baf95b36; e9576198e9ee767ede4b1ac6a739267aa52a9832; 00e889fcfaf4396a20f37f681cf8b14f3e878879; cde19e90b461f6c5f6cb8cde74931abf6c0d56c9; eaa313e22766d1b39f70b3eb86a4658dd66bc92e

    - Concepts in Building LMs | papers: 9ea8001d6eb52d14134ceede7f88b1d8fa8db41f; 7754ac3e8ff1286f17593159781487543cdddaba; ca53c1d1ba1a1386f860fa13d7729160571e1643; d6a8e685b46f79056076a6b65803d49493a99dca; 909ad57ce8caa6b390a65ae09db352d27d8f3996; cef2e06efd484520808dfbeeee2029c4d06bd799; 9df4bfd06331557e1c0edf7937d20bd755369ed0; 06bf264a76b49b3e4b2c6285ebee49810162ff7b; 9495f0f50ef9a3225e8e230746a8f139d27ce8cc; 017010b941d902a467f6d329ae5e74fd67e67912; 3c6f2e0c5ff5dff6151c3e6489378a53318a75b4; 51bccfc8d164812cf81b0284a5ec13bf4002ae3c; 7d22ad3573101337bca2091fb0114b377c4f3db6; abdb0f9d1486dbb024c4bc9f8f9dc40464c58715; 7d00e7337fbbccd0208361b4c204c75239a96521; b463f5dd8ed6871ddeac03754c1c2d99547b08fe; 993611f5d9f1585c861c9806f8df84d2cdbb19d0; a57ef1f5c3af185af79751855b8033b7fc6d89b3; ef9079f32e806e4d297cee28f36b2321acee9eb3; 6f838a11544c7b02d051814269a20cd459a2ac40; d58c87575a4e00da93be0d63af568ac10532aab4; 49b7baceecd32f81a08aa8e84e2fe71c2b879ee6; a5d3a865b71f3f424ba31e037848028f60161478; 9e8cb8c91a0acb6e661b58ad724aa758490f2bea; 56fa65d8dc41708082f9b2ef7752c49cee9ebe01; a6348981246adcd42e8ba39acf139da745696eff; cb2c05ab5fd155af6acf57d7b229f16e04bf3e1b; 32ac52069e562d4f900afee70bdca63f53461481; f03bd1b959216fa22b3f72ef7f245e57ea7e45d7; d3a23b571143a45c5d7406fbc395750ac5cfef95; 3b7ef6f9f27e33e6a4e3bfac90dcb01ab09718bc; a10843d1349fff8d2a7d9722f800802187fef67f; 63167c30b06aa6c3d76e09065ced0412090d6c3b; 5c23ede95571641b2facf58aa387983e7d54c26a; 358b96ce1653ec489e7bf565c0f1afad81e502d0; bc107fc7af12344342b4d80d81650577e9e9845f; b6f94c835be068e5111c5b688cbeb8c3dbacd60b

    - Obtain SLMs from LLMs | papers: 9ea8001d6eb52d14134ceede7f88b1d8fa8db41f; 7754ac3e8ff1286f17593159781487543cdddaba; ca53c1d1ba1a1386f860fa13d7729160571e1643; d6a8e685b46f79056076a6b65803d49493a99dca; 909ad57ce8caa6b390a65ae09db352d27d8f3996; cef2e06efd484520808dfbeeee2029c4d06bd799; 9df4bfd06331557e1c0edf7937d20bd755369ed0; 06bf264a76b49b3e4b2c6285ebee49810162ff7b; 9495f0f50ef9a3225e8e230746a8f139d27ce8cc; 017010b941d902a467f6d329ae5e74fd67e67912; 3c6f2e0c5ff5dff6151c3e6489378a53318a75b4; 51bccfc8d164812cf81b0284a5ec13bf4002ae3c; 7d22ad3573101337bca2091fb0114b377c4f3db6; abdb0f9d1486dbb024c4bc9f8f9dc40464c58715; 7d00e7337fbbccd0208361b4c204c75239a96521; b463f5dd8ed6871ddeac03754c1c2d99547b08fe; 993611f5d9f1585c861c9806f8df84d2cdbb19d0; a57ef1f5c3af185af79751855b8033b7fc6d89b3; ef9079f32e806e4d297cee28f36b2321acee9eb3; 6f838a11544c7b02d051814269a20cd459a2ac40; d58c87575a4e00da93be0d63af568ac10532aab4; 49b7baceecd32f81a08aa8e84e2fe71c2b879ee6; a5d3a865b71f3f424ba31e037848028f60161478; 9e8cb8c91a0acb6e661b58ad724aa758490f2bea; 56fa65d8dc41708082f9b2ef7752c49cee9ebe01; a6348981246adcd42e8ba39acf139da745696eff; cb2c05ab5fd155af6acf57d7b229f16e04bf3e1b; 32ac52069e562d4f900afee70bdca63f53461481; f03bd1b959216fa22b3f72ef7f245e57ea7e45d7; d3a23b571143a45c5d7406fbc395750ac5cfef95; 3b7ef6f9f27e33e6a4e3bfac90dcb01ab09718bc; a10843d1349fff8d2a7d9722f800802187fef67f; 63167c30b06aa6c3d76e09065ced0412090d6c3b; 5c23ede95571641b2facf58aa387983e7d54c26a; 358b96ce1653ec489e7bf565c0f1afad81e502d0; bc107fc7af12344342b4d80d81650577e9e9845f; b6f94c835be068e5111c5b688cbeb8c3dbacd60b
    - SLM for extracting LLM prompts | papers: 8287fbf2c520f7604aae19a590ea9494d356aae7; 3d90d1d429fa9dacb50a103cdab5c16328665c2c; b9df0d4631f9fab1432c152765e243ae4cd667f4; c4c16df426e0a4b1b501406edd193ae04ac0767e
    - Trustworthiness in SLMs | papers: 3cf3f50cb5379099f8fc98c9dd429944fef47f94; c9c0324fcdc92cf7e24f9c4230864851a552f953; 4e93c926cbbb27c955277b066fe6ec1aa912d38d; da89cdeb0014666f4024f797d0c67cd45d92a7c9; d30e8ac45470dcc9208edb7a518d69088ae925e8; 14ba788bf3b55ddcb515aad2deb45c6a4422e473; b0a890c4726b98139e51669f39dafbad568c352f; e0384ba36555232c587d4a80d527895a095a9001; 3310490e2a88b1ce2ad062ae4dfd597918c0dde4; ce913026f693101e54d3ab9152e107034d81fce1; 8e22730a5af03a77e77ec2bbc070396aaca51e8c; fb4dc0178e5d7347b1615c48caf05347b6e5eb48; f9f23c63e2822687096b86edf4ae9435cb579b8c; d979b2fd5ceb4b4ca2bc61adae19dd474133646c; aa3def6c0d6eef8183e9b78894a711ed9e092df6; 964da38f24d3a2e65474728eef05f3de9e47666d; d15091e73f7295ba8c0bdbabe0b7188307c96039; f3a41a5bfec0d8ccb597d9313416130a2e0b2459
      - Quantization | papers: cb2c05ab5fd155af6acf57d7b229f16e04bf3e1b; 32ac52069e562d4f900afee70bdca63f53461481; f03bd1b959216fa22b3f72ef7f245e57ea7e45d7; d3a23b571143a45c5d7406fbc395750ac5cfef95; 3b7ef6f9f27e33e6a4e3bfac90dcb01ab09718bc; a10843d1349fff8d2a7d9722f800802187fef67f; 63167c30b06aa6c3d76e09065ced0412090d6c3b; 5c23ede95571641b2facf58aa387983e7d54c26a; 358b96ce1653ec489e7bf565c0f1afad81e502d0; bc107fc7af12344342b4d80d81650577e9e9845f; b6f94c835be068e5111c5b688cbeb8c3dbacd60b
  - SLM for LLM applications | papers: 88b62496cbc52072bfa8f4b29d172b0477b701bc; 5b46ebad43c6bbd45249fd1490b9bd7a86d1acda; 84078a137029d70e8b51041354cd931d1196806d; 75264034416e5c2f552efb5783624d240e0ea4f6
